title: alpinia padacanca
intro: Alpinia padacanca, also known as the Lesser Galangal or Thai Galangal, is a type of rhizomatous plant belonging to the ginger family. It is commonly used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alpinia padacanca include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, as well as exhibiting anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. Alpinia padacanca is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in cooking and as a spice in various Southeast Asian cuisines.
